source: Web research (2025-2026): jdi.group, openvc.app, papermark.com, shizune.co, vietcetera, 500.co, theinvestor.vn — compiled 2026-07-18
note: Seed = names + light hints only. Enrichment agents produce the real sourced profiles; provenance audit flags any unverifiable entry.

investors.name: Mekong Capital
investors.note: Est. 2001; consumer-driven; among the most established VN funds

investors.name: 500 Global Vietnam
investors.note: Largest VN VC by deal count; seed stage

investors.name: Touchstone Partners
investors.note: Active early-stage; climate, agri, education, healthcare

investors.name: VinVentures
investors.note: Vingroup fund, launched Oct 2024; high-impact tech

investors.name: Ascend Vietnam Ventures
investors.note: AVV (fka Ascend); early stage; Eddie Thai / Binh Tran

investors.name: Do Ventures
investors.note: Prominent VN early-stage; Dzung Nguyen & Vy Le

investors.name: Genesia Ventures
investors.note: Japan-based; pre-seed/seed across SEA incl. Vietnam; DX

investors.name: VIISA
investors.note: Vietnam Innovative Startup Accelerator; enterprise SW, fintech, health, edu

investors.name: Antler Vietnam
investors.note: Global day-zero incubator + pre-seed; VN presence
